title: Phantom Voice
description: Learn to identify deepfake audio and protect your voice online.
steps: Listen to the two audio clips.
Identify which one sounds robotic or lacks natural breathing.

quiz.question: What is a common sign of a deepfake audio?

title: Chatterbox Spy
description: Discover how chatbots can leak information and how to talk to them safely.
steps: Find the message where the user shared personal information.
Rewrite the message to be safe.

quiz.question: Which of these is safe to share with an AI chatbot?

title: The Mind Trick
description: Understand AI manipulation and how algorithms try to keep your attention.
steps: Identify the algorithm's attempt to show controversial content.
Adjust the settings to prioritize educational content.

quiz.question: Why do algorithms sometimes show controversial content?
